---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the MCP server, canvas UI, workflows, or skill package.
title: '[feature] '
labels: ['type:enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Problem

What problem does this solve for operators, contributors, or agent users?

## Proposed Change

Describe the shape of the solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds or rejected approaches.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, sample prompts, or implementation notes if useful.
